Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED dba GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted. The court awarded sanctions of $340.00. No opposition was filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
